name: Best Practices in Hardware and Software Industry Product Launch Process — A Management Report for Sun Microsystems, Inc.
description: Aberdeen management report for Sun Microsystems (Aug 2002) benchmarking product launch processes. Interviews conducted June-July 2002 with 5 of 28 approached companies (Dell, IBM, Unisys, Computer Associates, Xerox — rest declined due to strategic sensitivity). Documents detailed lead times (beta testing 14d, configurator 30-45d, readiness review 90d/30d/7-14d/1-7d, pricing 60d guidelines/30-45d signoff, training 14d or 4-6 weeks, web site 30d) and delivery methods for launch materials.
